column1: # Only functions whose bodies directly expose their semantics are named here.

column4: On the aging path power_source bit 2 forces the early common tail; its two bank0 hooks are RET stubs and preserve caller-seeded R7=1, which the caller then stores in shared scratch XRAM[0x0A54]
Compares desired EC[0x0522:0x0523] with queued XRAM[0x0836:0x0837], or checks the 0x3138 fallback target when the normal battery path is inactive
Queues the current desired charge voltage when the caller gate is true or the explicit 0x3138 fallback target when false, then sets voltage command bit 1

After command 0x1C/0x1E probes, reads vendor command 0x42 into XRAM[0x0342], command 0x43 into the cycle-count cache XRAM[0x0343:0x0344], and additional battery telemetry; vendor register names are unknown
Validates fuel-gauge caches, derives last-full capacity, and publishes ACPI BIF/BST battery fields
Copies internal fuel-gauge cache XRAM[0x0343:0x0344] to public EC[0x04A6:0x04A7]
Compares ACPI BTP0 EC[0x0704:0x0705] with remaining capacity and raises SCI query 0x89 on a directional crossing
Consumes charger command bits, issues SMBus commands 0x14/0x15 and requeues a bit when the shared word-data staging bytes differ from the queued command mirror
Timer0 phase task called every 144 approximately 5-ms ticks; invokes battery voltage derating and related maintenance
Selects platform power/performance table entries by requested profile and RSOC while running without AC

Shared optional-RGB template path: handles EC[0x076F], indexes waveform tables with XRAM[0x0857], and updates XRAM[0x1803/0x1805/0x1808]; current project EC[0x0766].2 reports this hardware unsupported
Derives EC[0x0522:0x0523] from high-voltage stress, cycle count, battery mode and caller-seeded XRAM[0x0A54]; the highest auxiliary threshold compares XRAM[0x0A54], not XRAM[0x0857]
Builds the four-byte command descriptor at XRAM[0x0A6E:0x0A71] with data pointer 0x00C0
Returns EC[0x0741] bit 0 (ApExistFlag)
Returns EC[0x0490] bit 0; exact human state name remains platform-dependent
Returns EC[0x0751] masked with 0x90
Returns EC[0x0727] bit 6
Returns EC[0x0466] bit 4

Callable shared tail that compares the caller's accumulator A with 25 and returns carry set when A is below 25; the aging caller passes XRAM[0x0A54], while CODE:E051 first loads XRAM[0x0857] then falls through here
Returns EC[0x049F] bit 1
Returns EC[0x07CC] bit 0
Returns EC[0x0751] bit 7
Returns EC[0x0456] bit 7; exact platform meaning remains unknown
Returns EC[0x07C6] bit 2
Returns EC[0x0490] bit 2; exact power state remains unknown
Clears EC[0x0726] bit 7 and returns zero
XOR-compares XRAM[0x00C0] with the byte addressed by the caller's DPTR
XOR-compares XRAM[0x00C1] with the byte addressed by the caller's DPTR
Compares EC[0x04AB] RSOC against 0x29
Returns the first byte at EC[0x0434]
Copies internal PWM state EC[0x1804] to public EC[0x075B]
Returns EC[0x0751] bit 4
Returns EC[0x07C5] bit 7
Returns EC[0x078C] bit 1
Returns EC[0x0497] bit 0; CODE:D1BB converts it to caller seed R7=1 or 0 for the battery voltage-derating path
Clears internal tachometer state and public EC[0x046B] second-fan RPM
Returns EC[0x0766] bit 2 from the official capability map
